description_long: This is a large, symmetrical brick school building complex with a central main structure flanked by two wings and two detached side buildings. The main building features a steep, dark roof with dormer windows and a central chimney, while the wings and side buildings have matching rooflines and window arrangements. A circular driveway with a landscaped island and tree sits in front of the main entrance, leading to a paved walkway lined with hedges and trees. The complex is enclosed by low green hedges, creating a formal courtyard layout. The windows are white-framed and evenly spaced, contributing to a classic, institutional appearance. The overall design suggests a traditional, prestigious educational facility, possibly inspired by Colonial Revival architecture.
description: A large, symmetrical brick school complex with a central main building, two wings, and two detached side structures, surrounded by hedges and a landscaped courtyard. The design features steep dark roofs, white-framed windows, and a formal entrance with a circular driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway with a central tree, and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings and side buildings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the complex, the detached side building, and the hedged courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, the symmetry of the wings, and the tree-lined walkway leading to the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other detached side building, the courtyard, and the arrangement of trees and hedges.
